home.title_seo: Medpro - Quick booking at 100+ hospitals and 1000+ clinics
home.description_seo: A digital healthcare platform trusted by 4 million users, 100+ hospitals, and 1000+ clinics. Comprehensive booking solutions via hotline 19002115, web, app, and social networks.
home.title: Home

intro_section.title: Connecting people with Healthcare Services
intro_section.description: Fast booking - Online queue number - Remote health consultation

blog_section.title: Quick medical booking
blog_section.description: Providing online healthcare appointment booking services at leading hospitals in Vietnam such as University Medical Center HCMC, Cho Ray Hospital, and Children's Hospital, allowing users to choose services and doctors according to their needs.

blogs.title: Because your time is priceless
blogs.description: Patients can proactively select booking information (date and time)

blogs.title: Caring for every family's health
blogs.description: Patients will receive online appointment tickets directly on the application

blogs.title: Bringing healthcare closer to everyone
blogs.description: Users can choose and make payments directly on the application

medical_facilities_section.title: Featured hospitals
medical_facilities_section.description: Book appointments with more than {{count}} medical facilities nationwide

hero_section.title: Quick booking - Get queue number online
hero_section.description: Patients can proactively select booking information (date, time, and medical facility). Patients will receive an online queue number directly on the system.

items.title: Get queue numbers quickly online
items.description:
Register for medical visits / follow-up by date.
Register by specialty.
Follow-up according to appointment schedule

items.title: Remote medical consultation
items.description: Online healthcare consultation and video calls with doctors

items.title: Check laboratory results
items.description: Easily access laboratory test results online

items.title: Hospital fee payment
items.description: Diverse online payment systems. Supports popular e-wallets

items.title: Home healthcare services
items.description: Professional home healthcare services (nursing, testing) to meet common healthcare needs at home

items.title: Partner medical network
items.description: Network connecting hospitals, clinics, and medical facilities nationwide

medical_facilities.description_seo: Search and book appointments at more than 100 hospitals and 1000+ reputable clinics nationwide. Medpro helps you book quickly, conveniently, and save time.
medical_facilities.title: BOOK AT MEDICAL FACILITIES
medical_facilities.description: Fast booking, time-saving, safe and convenient

news.title_seo: Latest medical news - Updated continuously from Medpro | {{brand}}

news.title: News

about.title_seo: About Medpro - The most widely used healthcare application | {{brand}}
about.description_seo: Learn about Medpro, a pioneering application connecting users with healthcare services. Simplifying access to healthcare, treatment, and medical consultation.
about.title: About us
about.description: This application allows patients and their families to register for hospital appointments online anytime and anywhere without needing to visit the hospital directly.

login.description_seo: Login to Medpro to quickly book appointments at more than 100 hospitals and reputable clinics. Easily manage appointments and medical records.
